ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, player) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name for personalization */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name for personalization */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth for age verification and responsible gaming */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact information for user support */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for compliance and shipping purposes */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "self_exclusion" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has opted for self-exclusion */,
  "daily_wager_limit" REAL /* Daily limit on the amount the user can wager */,
  "weekly_wager_limit" REAL /* Weekly limit on the amount the user can wager */,
  "monthly_wager_limit" REAL /* Monthly limit on the amount the user can wager */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login for activity tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., MLB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sport is active for betting */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sport's logo for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport played in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_a" TEXT /* Name of the first team */,
  "team_b" TEXT /* Name of the second team */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is live or not */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game on which the bet was placed */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., point spread, total) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount wagered on the bet */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds associated with the bet */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, settled, canceled) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the bet (e.g., win, loss, push) */,
  "payout" REAL /* Amount paid out if the bet wins */,
  "is_live_bet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bet was placed during a live game */,
  "bet_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bet for clarity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the result */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Final score of team A */,
  "team_b_score" INTEGER /* Final score of team B */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the result (e.g., overtime, penalties) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the data belongs */,
  "total_bets" INTEGER /* Total number of bets placed by the user */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of winning bets */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losing bets */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit or loss of the user */,
  "average_bet_amount" REAL /* Average amount wagered per bet */,
  "max_bet_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount wagered in a single bet */,
  "min_bet_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount wagered in a single bet */,
  "favorite_sport" TEXT /* Favorite sport based on betting activity */,
  "favorite_team" TEXT /* Favorite team based on betting activity */,
  "favorite_bet_type" TEXT /* Favorite type of bet based on activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, player) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_types" (
  "bet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet type */,
  "bet_name" TEXT /* Name of the bet type (e.g., moneyline, point spread) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bet type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bet type is active for betting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bets" (
  "user_bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-bet relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet placed by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-bet relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-bet relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bets_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id")
)
